author: davidme6
changelog: V3.0.0-multiuser: Added multi-user support with individual health profiles. Interactive Feishu notifications that ask for real-time data. Scientific calorie calculation using Mifflin-St Jeor formula. BMR/TDEE calculation, macro distribution, meal planning. Food calorie database and analysis. Dedicated Feishu notification group for health alerts only. All notifications sent to Feishu group, not development chat.
